MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Joe Vickstein. Sally Morin, Esq. represented Plaintiff Sherry Campos and Defendant, Walter E. Campos appeared in pro per. The case settled per oral stipulation of the parties, read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
